issue.title: fanqienovel.com

labels.name: A: Cannot reproduce
labels.description: Filters devs cannot reproduce this issue

labels.name: A: In progress
labels.description: Work on the issue is in progress

labels.name: A: Waiting for data
labels.description: Waiting for more information from the user

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Ads) [https://fanqienovel.com](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Ffanqienovel.com) ### Comment > 进入番茄小说手机APP版，软件显示已拦截成功，但是实际上还是有拦截广告出现 ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://reports.adguard.info/stcdn/sitereports/ncorlhdamas4o40k4ks0gkwkscgcs0skslynyigy8g.jpg?nc=1)
Screenshot 2 ![Screenshot 2](https://reports.adguard.info/stcdn/sitereports/90nhmi7aymo8c8csgwccg44oow88ggk93bpyark5gc.jpg?nc=1)

AdGuard Base filter,
AdGuard Mobile Ads filter

**Privacy:**

Fanboy's Anti-Facebook List,
AdGuard URL Tracking filter,

**Security:**

**Other:**

Filter unblocking search ads and self-promotion,

**Language-specific:**

Block trackers,
Strip URLs from tracking parameters,
Send Do-Not-Track header

**Miscellaneous**:
Remove X-Client-Data header from HTTP requests DNS filtering: | server: `System`
filters: `https://filters.adtidy.org/android/filters/15_optimized.txt` Browsing Security: | enabled Browsing Security statistics: | disabled Userscripts: | `https://userscripts.adtidy.org/release/adguard-extra/1.0/adguard-extra.meta.js` Userstyles: | disabled Other extensions used: | `无安装杀毒软件和广告拦截器` ### Issue configuration [Import](https://reports.adguard.info/settings/import.html?product_type=and&product_version=4.14+Nightly+15&system_version=Android+13&browser=chrome&filters=101.123.204.225.20.224.17.257.118.255.14.5.19.3.208.251.18.239.2.21.22.256.10.15.4.11.259&dns_servers=System&userscripts=https%3A%2F%2Fuserscripts.adtidy.org%2Frelease%2Fadguard-extra%2F1.0%2Fadguard-extra.meta.js&android.mode=VPN&android.system_root=false&dns.filters=https%3A%2F%2Ffilters.adtidy.org%2Fandroid%2Ffilters%2F15_optimized.txt&dns.filters_enabled=true&dns.enabled=true&https.filtering=true&browsing_security.enabled=true&browsing_security.statistics_enabled=false&stealth.enabled=true&stealth.webrtc=false&stealth.push=false&stealth.location=false&stealth.strip_url=true&stealth.hide_search_queries=false&stealth.DNT=true&stealth.x_client=true&stealth.dpi=false&stealth.third_party_cookies=180&stealth.first_party_cookies=4320&stealth.disable_third_party_cache=false&stealth.block_third_party_auth=false&stealth.block_trackers=true&license_type=paid&dns.timeout=5000)

comment.body:
> Ok, found the apk. Ads are blocked. Please clear the filtering log, close this app, reproduce ads and export the filtering log (new feature in the last nightly build), and upload the file here.

也就是说，我需要下载最新的夜间版本进行测试？
